name: OAuth Application Granted High-Privilege Consent
description: Identifies an OAuth application being granted high-privilege delegated permissions, a hallmark of illicit consent grant (application impersonation) attacks against cloud identity.
query: event.dataset : "o365.audit" and event.action : "Consent to application." and o365.audit.ModifiedProperties.ConsentAction.Value : "*Scope: *Mail.Read*"
false_positives: Sanctioned application onboarding will generate consent events.

name: MFA Fatigue Push Bombing
description: Repeated MFA push challenges to a single user in a short window.
